comparison.metric: ImageMagick RGBA RMSE/PSNR and alpha-support masks
comparison.notes: Sketch and ImageIO use different edge antialiasing and gradient quantization, so pure-vector output cannot satisfy zero absolute pixel error across renderers.

chromeComparison.metric: ImageMagick RGBA NCC/RMSE/PSNR, alpha-support masks, and exact differing pixels
chromeComparison.notes: The final Sketch PNG is the sole visual oracle. The companion SVG structure is not a parity requirement. The acceptance contract requires at least 99.95% normalized cross-correlation similarity, independently bounded color RMSE, and at least 99.95% alpha-support overlap.
